query: Identify Shari Mattingly's mother (born 1923) by tracing T.C. Frost III + Florence Herff children and Bexar County marriages 1944-1948

best_candidate.death_place: Colorado Springs, El Paso County, Colorado, USA

father.name: Frederick Charles Lepick Sr.
father.notes: Lifelong San Antonio TX area resident. Occupation not found in accessible public records.

siblings_of_jennive.name: Fred Charles Lepick Jr.
siblings_of_jennive.notes: Naval Aviator, Ensign September 1945. Lifelong San Antonio TX resident. Brackenridge High School graduate. No banking connections documented.

marriage.note: Leroy died at age 90 at Village at Skyline, Colorado Springs, five years after Jennive.

children.name: Sharyn (Shari) Mattingly
children.note: Named in Leroy Mattingly 2013 obituary as surviving child.

chemistry_physics_degree.detail: Obituary states 'degree as a dietician from Our Lady of the Lake College, San Antonio.' Dietetics requires substantial chemistry coursework. The oral tradition of 'chemistry/physics degree' likely reflects curriculum content rather than exact degree title.

brother_was_frost_bank_president.detail: Fred Charles Lepick Jr. (only known brother) was a Naval Aviator with no documented connection to Frost Bank. Frost Bank was led exclusively by the Frost family dynasty (T.C. Frost I-IV). The claim is unverified oral tradition.
working_hypotheses: An undocumented half-sibling or step-sibling of Jennive through Frederick Lepick Sr.
Family mythology — Frost Bank was the dominant San Antonio financial institution; the claim may be social aspiration rather than documented fact

married_leroy_mattingly_1944_1948.detail: Marriage date December 18, 1943 — slightly before the 1944-1948 search window, but consistent with wartime courtship.

eliminated_hypotheses.hypothesis: Shari's mother was a daughter of T.C. Frost III (1903-1971) and Florence Ilse Herff (1906-1984)
eliminated_hypotheses.elimination_reason: Leroy Mattingly's 2013 obituary definitively confirms he married Jennive Lepick, not a Frost. The Frost-Herff daughter hypothesis is fully eliminated.

sources.name: Leroy Baity Mattingly obituary 2013
sources.publisher: Shrine of Remembrance / The Gazette Colorado Springs

sources.name: Jennive Imogene Mattingly (Lepick) obituary 2008 — PPLD Digital Collections
key_facts: dietician degree Our Lady of the Lake College

sources.name: Find a Grave memorial 36080759 — Genevieve L. Jennive Lepick Mattingly
WikiTree Mattingly-1178
key_facts: parents Leroy Teichmueller Mattingly + Ruth Baity

sources.name: PeopleLegacy — Herman F. Boehme
key_facts: Herman Boehme 1863-1900 Shiner TX had 6 children including Hilda Boehme Lepick 1900-1945

sources.name: Fred Charles Lepick Jr. obituary — multiple sources
key_facts: parents Hilda Boehme + Fred Charles Lepick Sr.

sources.name: UTSA Oral History Collection — Interview with Tom Frost 1994
key_facts: does not mention sisters or Mattingly family

next_steps_if_unresolved: Request full Jennive Mattingly obituary scan from PPLD (email: regionalhistorygenealogy@ppld.org) — may include sibling names or Frost Bank mention
Our Lady of the Lake University Archives (San Antonio) — Jennive's 1940 enrollment records would confirm exact degree program and chemistry coursework
Wilson County TX courthouse — Frederick Charles Lepick Sr. vital records, citizenship, occupation
Texas State Library — San Antonio city directory 1920s-1940s, 'Lepick' entries for occupation
